title: Fix interface and struct pattern collision (#5640)

features.name: interface containing struct member variable
features.description: Code should include an interface with a struct-typed member variable

features.name: assignment pattern with interface member struct field access
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern with a key, where the value accesses a struct field through an interface member

features.name: struct field name collision with identifier
features.description: Code should include a struct field name that collides with another identifier in scope, triggering an internal error during name resolution
